text:
You are assigned Task #2: Update DATABASE_ERD_MERMAID.md with missing entities and diagrams.

## Your task
Read all JPA Entity files under `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/` and update `docs/DATABASE_ERD_MERMAID.md` to add missing entity diagrams and fix inconsistencies.

## Step-by-step instructions

### Phase 1: Read existing document
1. Read `docs/DATABASE_ERD_MERMAID.md` fully to understand its current structure, Mermaid syntax style, and section organization

### Phase 2: Read ALL entity files for accurate relationships
Read entity files in these directories to understand fields and FK relationships:
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/crm/model/productinquiry/entity/` (4 entities)
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/crm/model/cashRefund/entity/`
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/crm/model/cstemplate/entity/`
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/crm/model/csprocesshistory/entity/`
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/purchaseAmountManage/model/entity/` (4 entities)
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/keyword/model/entity/`
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/orchestration/model/entity/`
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/linkAdminConfiguration/model/entity/`
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/order/model/entity/` (BarJu*, Emp* entities)
- `src/main/java/com/fimasia/linkbe/biz/partner/model/entity/` (ALL partner report entities)

### Phase 3: Edit DATABASE_ERD_MERMAID.md
1. Add new Mermaid erDiagram sections for missing domains:
   - PurchaseAmount (매입관리) — include PurchaseAmount, PurchaseAmountDeposit, PurchaseAmountItems, PurchaseAmountMonthlyMemo and their relationships
   - Keyword (인기검색어) — PopularKeywordDeployHistory
   - Calendar (캘린더) — CalendarEntity
   - LinkAdminConfiguration (설정) — LinkAdminConfigurationEntity

2. Update the overview/bird's-eye diagram (Section 1) to include the new domains

3. Update existing domain diagrams:
   - Partner domain: Add PartnerCsReport, PartnerDailyReport, PartnerDeliveryReport, PartnerGoodsReport, PartnerReport, PartnerMemoDashboard, PartnerOrderDelayMemo, PartnerSmsSendHistory, PartnerSmsSendPolicy, PartnerStatIndicatorsManageHistory, PartnerStatIndicatorsStds with proper relationships
   - CRM domain: Add CashRefund, CsTemplate, CsGroupProcessHistory with relationships
   - Order domain: Add BarJuReady, BarJuReadyError, BarJuProgress, BarJuHistory, BarJuConvertError, BarJuDispatchError, EmpLocation, EmpProductCodeTemp, EmpMatchingProduct with relationships

4. Fix label/comment consistency across diagrams

5. Use the SAME Mermaid erDiagram syntax style as existing diagrams (entity names, field types, relationship notation)

### Phase 4: 3-pass review
After all edits:
1. Read the full document. Validate every Mermaid diagram uses correct syntax (erDiagram, ||--o{, etc.). Cross-check entities against code.
2. Read again. Check that all FK relationships are accurately represented.
3. Read one final time. Ensure formatting consistency and no missing entities.

## Important rules
- Match existing Mermaid syntax style exactly
- Use actual @Table names for entity names in diagrams
- Represent @ManyToOne, @OneToMany, @OneToOne relationships correctly using Mermaid notation
- Do NOT modify drawdb-erd.sql
- Mark Task #2 as completed when done using TaskUpdate
